name: Customer Profitability & Attrition Signals

elements.body:
## **Customer Profitability — Overview**

Net interest income, gross income, margin, and customer reach across the bank's portfolio.

columns.formula: CountDistinct(If(IsNotNull([Customer Financials Enriched P1/Loan Amount]), [Customer Financials Enriched P1/Customer Key], Null))
columns.name: Customers Served

elements.name: Net Interest Income by Customer Segment
Net Interest Income by Customer Type

columns.formula: Lookup([Customer Master P1/Customer Name], [Customer Key], [Customer Master P1/Customer Key])
columns.name: Customer Name

columns.formula: Lookup([Customer Master P1/Customer Type], [Customer Key], [Customer Master P1/Customer Key])
columns.name: Customer Type

columns.formula: Lookup([Customer Master P1/Customer Segment], [Customer Key], [Customer Master P1/Customer Key])
columns.name: Customer Segment

columns.formula: Lookup([Customer Master P1/Risk Rating], [Customer Key], [Customer Master P1/Customer Key])
columns.name: Risk Rating

columns.formula: Lookup([Customer Master P1/Age], [Customer Key], [Customer Master P1/Customer Key])
columns.name: Age

columns.formula: Lookup([Customer Master P1/Annual Income], [Customer Key], [Customer Master P1/Customer Key])
columns.name: Annual Income

columns.formula: Lookup([Customer Master P1/Credit Score], [Customer Key], [Customer Master P1/Customer Key])
columns.name: Credit Score

columns.formula: Lookup([Customer Master P1/Years With Bank], [Customer Key], [Customer Master P1/Customer Key])
columns.name: Years With Bank

columns.formula: Lookup([Customer Master P1/Lifetime Value Score], [Customer Key], [Customer Master P1/Customer Key])
columns.name: Lifetime Value Score

columns.formula: Lookup([Customer Master P1/Relationship Manager], [Customer Key], [Customer Master P1/Customer Key])
columns.name: Relationship Manager

columns.formula: Lookup([Branch Master P1/Branch Name], [Branch Key], [Branch Master P1/Branch Key])
columns.name: Branch Name

columns.formula: Lookup([Branch Master P1/Branch Region], [Branch Key], [Branch Master P1/Branch Key])
columns.name: Branch Region

columns.formula: Lookup([Branch Master P1/Branch State], [Branch Key], [Branch Master P1/Branch Key])
columns.name: Branch State

columns.formula: If([Years With Bank] < 1, "0-1yr", If([Years With Bank] < 3, "1-3yr", If([Years With Bank] < 5, "3-5yr", If([Years With Bank] < 10, "5-10yr", "10+yr"))))
columns.name: Tenure Bracket

columns.formula: If([Credit Score] < 580, "Subprime (300-579)", If([Credit Score] < 670, "Fair (580-669)", If([Credit Score] < 740, "Good (670-739)", If([Credit Score] < 800, "Very Good (740-799)", "Exceptional (800+)"))))
columns.name: Credit Score Band

columns.formula: If(IsNotNull([Loan Amount]), [Interest Income] + [Fee Income] - [Cost of Funds] - [Operating Cost], 0)
columns.name: NII Row

elements.body:
## **Profitability Drivers**

Which customer demographics, tenure brackets, and branches actually carry the income.

elements.name: Net Interest Income by Tenure Bracket
Net Interest Income by Age Bracket
Net Interest Income by Credit Score Band
Net Interest Income by Branch Region

elements.body:
## **Attrition Signals**

Closed accounts as a leading indicator. At-risk = any account closed in last 180 days.

columns.formula: Zn(CountIf(IsNotNull([Customer Financials Enriched P3/Close Date])) / Count([Customer Financials Enriched P3/Customer Key]))
columns.name: % Accounts Closed

columns.formula: CountDistinct(If([Customer Financials Enriched P3/Recently Closed], [Customer Financials Enriched P3/Customer Key], Null))
columns.name: At-Risk Customers

columns.formula: Zn(SumIf([Customer Financials Enriched P3/NII Row], [Customer Financials Enriched P3/Recently Closed]))
columns.name: NII at Risk

columns.formula: Zn(CountIf(IsNotNull([Customer Financials Enriched P3/Close Date])) / Count([Customer Financials Enriched P3/Customer Key]))
columns.name: Closure Rate

columns.formula: Zn(CountIf(IsNotNull([Customer Financials Enriched P3/Close Date])) / Count([Customer Financials Enriched P3/Customer Key]))
columns.name: Closure Rate

columns.formula: Lookup([Customer Master P2/Customer Name], [Customer Key], [Customer Master P2/Customer Key])
columns.name: Customer Name

columns.formula: Lookup([Customer Master P2/Customer Type], [Customer Key], [Customer Master P2/Customer Key])
columns.name: Customer Type

columns.formula: Lookup([Customer Master P2/Customer Segment], [Customer Key], [Customer Master P2/Customer Key])
columns.name: Customer Segment

columns.formula: Lookup([Customer Master P2/Risk Rating], [Customer Key], [Customer Master P2/Customer Key])
columns.name: Risk Rating

columns.formula: Lookup([Customer Master P2/Age], [Customer Key], [Customer Master P2/Customer Key])
columns.name: Age

columns.formula: Lookup([Customer Master P2/Annual Income], [Customer Key], [Customer Master P2/Customer Key])
columns.name: Annual Income

columns.formula: Lookup([Customer Master P2/Credit Score], [Customer Key], [Customer Master P2/Customer Key])
columns.name: Credit Score

columns.formula: Lookup([Customer Master P2/Years With Bank], [Customer Key], [Customer Master P2/Customer Key])
columns.name: Years With Bank

columns.formula: Lookup([Customer Master P2/Lifetime Value Score], [Customer Key], [Customer Master P2/Customer Key])
columns.name: Lifetime Value Score

columns.formula: Lookup([Customer Master P2/Relationship Manager], [Customer Key], [Customer Master P2/Customer Key])
columns.name: Relationship Manager

columns.formula: Lookup([Branch Master P2/Branch Name], [Branch Key], [Branch Master P2/Branch Key])
columns.name: Branch Name

columns.formula: Lookup([Branch Master P2/Branch Region], [Branch Key], [Branch Master P2/Branch Key])
columns.name: Branch Region

columns.formula: Lookup([Branch Master P2/Branch State], [Branch Key], [Branch Master P2/Branch Key])
columns.name: Branch State

columns.formula: If([Years With Bank] < 1, "0-1yr", If([Years With Bank] < 3, "1-3yr", If([Years With Bank] < 5, "3-5yr", If([Years With Bank] < 10, "5-10yr", "10+yr"))))
columns.name: Tenure Bracket

columns.formula: If([Credit Score] < 580, "Subprime (300-579)", If([Credit Score] < 670, "Fair (580-669)", If([Credit Score] < 740, "Good (670-739)", If([Credit Score] < 800, "Very Good (740-799)", "Exceptional (800+)"))))
columns.name: Credit Score Band

columns.formula: If(IsNotNull([Loan Amount]), [Interest Income] + [Fee Income] - [Cost of Funds] - [Operating Cost], 0)
columns.name: NII Row

columns.formula: Lookup([Customer Master P3/Customer Name], [Customer Key], [Customer Master P3/Customer Key])
columns.name: Customer Name

columns.formula: Lookup([Customer Master P3/Customer Type], [Customer Key], [Customer Master P3/Customer Key])
columns.name: Customer Type

columns.formula: Lookup([Customer Master P3/Customer Segment], [Customer Key], [Customer Master P3/Customer Key])
columns.name: Customer Segment

columns.formula: Lookup([Customer Master P3/Risk Rating], [Customer Key], [Customer Master P3/Customer Key])
columns.name: Risk Rating

columns.formula: Lookup([Customer Master P3/Years With Bank], [Customer Key], [Customer Master P3/Customer Key])
columns.name: Years With Bank

columns.formula: Lookup([Customer Master P3/Relationship Manager], [Customer Key], [Customer Master P3/Customer Key])
columns.name: Relationship Manager

columns.formula: Lookup([Branch Master P3/Branch Name], [Branch Key], [Branch Master P3/Branch Key])
columns.name: Branch Name

columns.formula: Lookup([Branch Master P3/Branch Region], [Branch Key], [Branch Master P3/Branch Key])
columns.name: Branch Region

columns.formula: If([Years With Bank] < 1, "0-1yr", If([Years With Bank] < 3, "1-3yr", If([Years With Bank] < 5, "3-5yr", If([Years With Bank] < 10, "5-10yr", "10+yr"))))
columns.name: Tenure Bracket

columns.formula: If(IsNotNull([Loan Amount]), [Interest Income] + [Fee Income] - [Cost of Funds] - [Operating Cost], 0)
columns.name: NII Row

columns.formula: If(IsNotNull([Close Date]) and DateDiff("day", [Close Date], Today()) <= 180, True, False)
columns.name: Recently Closed

<Page type="grid" gridTemplateColumns="repeat(24, 1fr)" gridTemplateRows="auto" id="page-overview">
  <GridContainer elementId="p1-container-header" type="grid" gridColumn="1 / 25" gridRow="1 / 5" gridTemplateColumns="repeat(24, 1fr)" gridTemplateRows="auto">
